privacy.policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.policy.description: • We collect your Discord ID, server, XP, coins, and action history for bot functionality.
• Your data is **never** sold or shared with third parties.
• Ads displayed are from BankBot or sponsors — we never track clicks.
• You can delete all your data at any time with `/delete-data`.
• Data is retained for up to **30 days** after deletion for backup purposes, then permanently deleted.
• By using any BankBot command, you confirm you have read and agreed to these terms.
privacy.policy.accepted: Privacy policy accepted! Welcome to BankBot 🏦
privacy.policy.declined: You declined the privacy policy. You won't be able to use the bot.
privacy.policy.already_accepted: You have already accepted the privacy policy.
privacy.policy.missing.acceptance: You need to accept the privacy policy to use BankBot. Use /privacy to accept.

command.botinfo.title: 🤖 BankBot Information

note.value: Levels 11-20 follow the same curve. Confirm to apply.

help: Use `/profile-edit` to equip badges, wallpapers and colors.
Badges are displayed on your profile card and next to your name in the leaderboard.
Wallpapers are displayed on your profile card.
Colors change the color of your profile card and embeds with your info.
Frames are displayed around your profile picture on your profile card and next to your name in the leaderboard.

Use `/mission-rank` to view your mission completion rank.
